steps.title: Identify the key point both texts make about Ludington's current status
steps.content: Both texts explicitly state that Ludington is widely celebrated and revered by Americans today—Text 1 mentions “widely celebrated, inspiring postage stamps, statues, and even children's TV series,” and Text 2 notes “Ludington is revered by Americans today.”

steps.title: Match this to the choices
steps.content: Choice D—many people admire Ludington's story—directly matches the shared observation from both texts that she is widely celebrated and revered today. Choices A, B, and C require the texts to agree on historical facts—Ludington's military importance, a confirmed route, or her existence—which they clearly do not. That matches choice D — D is correct.
